args: Run a Codex TDD forge-loop cycle for this Rust repo. Goal: batch 20260627T084006Z cycle 10: run a TDD self-evaluating forge-loop cycle, prefer a small safe reliability/accuracy/speed self-upgrade, commit/push/PR/auto-merge if a real change is made. Required phases: write/verify a red test first, implement the smallest passing change, run fmt/clippy/tests/audit, evaluate the run, research one reliability/accuracy/speed improvement, and if a self-upgrade is warranted commit, push, open a PR, and auto-merge once green when repository settings allow. Strict upgrade only: no downgrades or removals without installed replacement and parity proof.
